ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "insurance_id" TEXT /* Insurance ID of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Patient's contact number */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the emergency contact */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Patient's blood type */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "icu_stays" (
  "icustay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ICU stay */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "intime" TEXT /* Time of admission to the ICU */,
  "outtime" TEXT /* Time of discharge from the ICU */,
  "los" INTEGER /* Length of stay in the ICU (in days) */,
  "icu_type" TEXT /* Type of ICU (e.g., Medical, Surgical) */,
  "admission_reason" TEXT /* Reason for ICU admission */,
  "discharge_reason" TEXT /* Reason for ICU discharge */,
  "icu_bed_number" INTEGER /* Specific bed number in the ICU */,
  "assigned_staff_id" INTEGER /* Staff member assigned to the patient */,
  "cpr_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if CPR was required during the stay */,
  "transfer_to_ward" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient was transferred to a ward after ICU discharge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icustay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icu_stays_assigned_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_staff_id") REFERENCES icu_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icu_stays_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_admissions" (
  "hadm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital admission */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "admittime" TEXT /* Time of admission to the hospital */,
  "dischtime" TEXT /* Time of discharge from the hospital */,
  "admission_type" TEXT /* Type of admission (e.g., Elective, Emergency) */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis during the admission */,
  "admitting_doctor_id" INTEGER /* Doctor who admitted the patient */,
  "attending_physician_id" INTEGER /* Attending physician */,
  "admission_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the admission */,
  "discharge_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the discharge */,
  "readmission_flag" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is a readmission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hadm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_admissions_admitting_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("admitting_doctor_id") REFERENCES icu_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_admissions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_admissions_attending_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("attending_physician_id") REFERENCES icu_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "icu_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource available */,
  "icu_type" TEXT /* Type of ICU where the resource is located */,
  "resource_location" TEXT /* Location of the resource within the ICU */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the resource (e.g., Available, In Use, Maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icu_resources_icu_type FOREIGN KEY ("icu_type") REFERENCES icu_stays ("icu_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "icu_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member in the ICU */,
  "icu_type" TEXT /* Type of ICU where the staff member works */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the staff member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the staff member */,
  "employment_date" TEXT /* Date of employment */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the staff member */,
  "shift_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the shift */,
  "shift_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the shift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icu_staff_icu_type FOREIGN KEY ("icu_type") REFERENCES icu_stays ("icu_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_medical_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical record */,
  "icustay_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ICU stay */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis during the ICU stay */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatments administered during the ICU stay */,
  "medications" TEXT /* Medications prescribed during the ICU stay */,
  "vital_signs" TEXT /* Vital signs (e.g., blood pressure, heart rate) */,
  "lab_results" TEXT /* Lab results */,
  "imaging_results" TEXT /* Imaging results (e.g., X-rays, MRIs) */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies */,
  "diagnosis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the diagnosis */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the treatment */,
  "medication_dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of prescribed medications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)
